claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Add AI Teammates to your customer experience team

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a direct link to the pricing page, making it unclear how to access it in two clicks.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible via the link labeled 'DOCS' on the homepage.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Integrate with your product APIs and third party apps using any MCP server.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Inkeep indexes everything so your agents retrieve the most relevant, up-to-date answers.
